scripts.wasm: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build --target web --no-opt --out-dir ../../src/wasm --out-name grid_core crates/grid-core
scripts.wasm:release: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../../src/wasm --out-name grid_core crates/grid-core
scripts.build:all: npm run wasm && npm run build
scripts.build:release: npm run wasm:release && npm run build
